entries.run_via: dw run (LOADER_PATH=uber jar) + server test-connection(上传驱动隔离加载)
entries.dw_run_vs_server: 本地dw run真跑三态齐;服务端test-connection上传驱动隔离加载SUCCESS(证机制);服务端任务执行在分布式worker上契约正确SKIPPED(D5:028已知限制无isolatedLoader+LOCAL存储jar不可达)
entries.notes: 唯一需上传驱动的引擎:hive-jdbc-4.0.0-standalone缺DelegationTokenIssuer→自组含hadoop-common的uber jar(103MB,driverClass自动检出HiveDriver);本地dw run SUCCESS(6语句真跑:CREATE PARTITIONED TABLE+INSERT PARTITION x2+SHOW PARTITIONS→dt=2026-07-10/11分区语义+SELECT聚合结果集渲染)/FAILURE(exit6 Hive原生SemanticException Table not found)/SKIPPED(无驱动→No suitable driver已跳过);服务端test-connection连接成功(上传驱动,Apache Hive 4.0.0,690ms)

defects.summary: buildCommand 缺 --master local 标志(默认连远程集群致超时)
JDK 25 不兼容(Hazelcast getSubject 移除→NPE)；executor 新增 JAVA_HOME→PATH 转发以支持 JDK 21 旁路

entries.notes: 收口复核(A):SKIPPED 补正——C 原 skipped.log 用 bogus sparkHome 触发 pip spark-submit 内部 spark-class 缺失=exit127(非干净SKIPPED,存 skipped_bogushome_127.log);经 sparkHome 指向无 bin/spark-submit 空目录重跑，命中 SparkTaskExecutor:156-157 真 SKIPPED 路径→exit0「已跳过：本地无 Spark 环境」;SUCCESS/FAILURE 证据不变
